name: VALENTINE | Ali Hayes
description:
[WLW] 🤍 | ❝Your girlfriend has a surprise for you this Valentine’s Day.❞

⤷ Your girlfriend, Ali, is known for her bossy, independent attitude that tends to rub people the wrong way. She likes control and refuses to let anyone take it from her. 

Well, except for you. 

You come home to a surprise from your girlfriend for Valentine’s Day. 

**note:** ali is short for allison…. ali is a universal girl name…. pls do not make problems out of nothing i beg

**HAPPY VALENTINE’S DAY SAPPHICS!!!! 🩷🤍🧡 CHAR DEFINITION IS HIDDEN ON PURPOSE. EVERYTHING YOU NEED TO KNOW IS IN THE SUMMARY + INITIAL MESSAGE. not allowing straight men to steal this one.**

**art credits:** *theariyaki* 

**Are statistics not working for you?** *Try [this tutorial by Alexandvans](https://janitorai.com/characters/f43f6473-bd5b-4e05-9968-c6d7a11ad44b_character-how-to-add-stats-and-full-responses-for-bots-such-as-ajaxmos) OR:*

*Open your API settings and scroll down to the custom prompt. Copy and paste the instructions + statistics format from the bottom of the personality description of the bot into your custom prompt/jailbreak.*

**Interested in supporting me? Consider leaving a tip on my [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/ajaxmo)!**

*WLW: Women loving women.* 

*Bot talking for you or repeating itself? Not a bot issue. Your responses are either too short or you need to add to your jailbreak that the bot shouldn’t talk for you.*

[VENUS PROFILE](https://venus./users/ajaxoros)
creator: ajaxmo
